We asked them to exempt us from that as there was no way we could do it with a small kid which they accepted. However, the only dinner option was the room service. They removed maximum items from room service and tripled the price of the 4-5 items that were left. There was only one option of Pasta for vegetarians and that did not even have a pinch of any veggies. We paid almost aed 300 for such shitty food. Even the breakfast buffet in the morning was same both days and the food was mostly cold. Hated their service. Never going back.

reviews.title: Check in and delay service
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at Sofitel Al Hamra Beach Resort in Ras Al Khaimah, and unfortunately, my experience was disappointing.

Upon arrival at check-in, we were informed that our room was still being cleaned and would be ready in 40 minutes. This was unexpected, especially since we had paid extra for a beach-view room. Instead, we were initially offered a room that did not have a beach view.

After expressing my frustration and explaining that I specifically came to enjoy the pool and beach—and that any further delay would reduce the value of my stay—they provided us with a temporary room so we could at least access the facilities.

Later, around 6 PM (approximately 3 hours after arrival), we received a call informing us that one room was ready. We moved, but still had to wait another 40 minutes for the second room. Both rooms were supposed to have beach views; however, one overlooked only the pool, and the other had its view partially blocked by a villa, limiting the beach view significantly.

Additionally, the service was quite slow. We requested an iron, which took exactly one hour to arrive. When we tried to contact buggy car service to move around the resort (as the room was quite far from the lobby), there was no response at all.

Overall, the delays, unmet expectations regarding the room view, and slow service affected our experience.

I’m so sad about that experience and I will not repeat it anymore

reviews.positives: The property is well located and has great views to the Beach and Al Marjan Islands.
reviews.negatives:
From the time we checked-in, we were misguided by someone to our room to First Floor without being asked and we had to go search for the Room in the First Floor where we were told the room was on the Ground Floor. When we checked-in to the Room, though we had reserved a specific amount at the Check-In, there was no Snacks or Drinks or anything in the Mini Bar. We personally requested the Reception to arrange and once again they came with just the Ice Cubes and we had to get back and request at the Reception and we were promised that it will be sorted out and they usually don't keep anything in the Mini Bar which is strange for that Class of Property and we were told that we have to specifically ask ? The in-room Dining had very less choice for Indian / Vegeterian Food and we had to settle down for what was available. Today morning during the Breakfast, the person serving the Orange Juice, spilled the Entire Tray of Orange Juice and Broke the Glass on me and thankfully no injuries. What a great start to a New Year isn't it ? 
The staff are too slow and are not at all hospitable. We felt they need further training and guidance. Now they seem to work under a lot of fear or stress which led to this incident. 
Anyways, we are done with this Property and will not be coming back!

Evening at Waka restaurant, which was a great setting food was good, service excellent, and the band was a nice addition. Overall, I highly recommend.

The resort as a whole is bland and has similar feel to other hotels that offer better value for money in RAK. They turn off the AC in the hallways to cut on cost.  We had to complain about it and the hotel had the —Engineering team— fix the issue well by …turning the AC back on.  Also the resort lacks covered parking so expect to jump in a car that’s flaming hot every time you are in or out of the hotel.  Ice cream cones by the pool cost a kidney.  Watch out.

Overall the design of the rooms and the hotel in general is uninspiring and expensive for what you get.  Better avoid.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The room we booked was nice and buffet was decent.
reviews.negatives:
We booked a suite with a private pool to celebrate a friend’s birthday, expecting a special and memorable experience, but what we got instead was pure frustration.

Before arriving, I had emailed to request an early check-in and was told they would “see what they could do.” That gave us some reassurance. But when we arrived at 1:00 PM, everything went downhill. We were told the suite wasn’t ready because the previous guests were still there and no one could even give us an estimate of when it would be available and that they don't know when the guests would leave. 

What made it worse was the complete lack of communication. Every time we approached reception for an update, we were met with the same response: “I don’t know.” over and over again. Imagine planning a birthday celebration and being left completely in the dark with zero information.

And if that wasn’t enough, we were promised a complimentary birthday cake when we made the booking. Based on that, we didn’t bring one ourselves. But of course, nothing was prepared. No cake, no acknowledgment, nothing. It completely ruined the moment we had planned.

Yes, the property itself is nice, but the experience? Completely overshadowed by poor service and a shocking lack of basic hospitality. For a place that’s supposed to deliver special moments, this was nothing short of a huge disappointment.

reviews.positives: I liked that the room was spacious and breakfast was fairly good with convenient swimming pool setting. Consierge did a good job.
reviews.negatives:
There was obviously dog hair on the carpet of the room. Hotel is not supposed to allow pets. Overall the room was clean but the balcony glass barrier was very dirty. Didn't make the seaview worth it.
The newly opened french restaurant disappointed. Prices are too high and the food isn't properly processed. As I'm expecting I had to ask them to fry the duck again but they barely did that and it was still bloody, which is not safe for pregnancy and I did explain that to the waiter when I requested for the duck to be fried  again. Their menu doesn't have proper description and it's waaay to high a price for the portions they give especially since I asked before going there for dinner if the portions are generous and I was assured they are but it wasn't the case. The advice they give me for the portions size was misleading and I ended up ordering less than I actually wanted to eat. They should be fair and honest with their offerings as the clients have the right to choose if to go and how many things to order there. Plus the prices on the menu weren't correct on some items and what was supposed to be a lovely anniversary dinner ended up to be an argument over the final bill (they were looking which waiter to blame that the steak was priced wrongly instead of just honoring the bill as per menu; we spent at least 20 extra min for them to sort this issue) and we also left kind of hungry ( I wish I was advised properly on the portions, the alternative to what I received was to order additional dishes and spend there a lot more time just not to leave hungry; not the plan that I had for the evening) also the staff was approaching tooo many times to ask if all was ok. I absolutely did not like to be bothered so many times during my dinner.

Spacious and comfortable rooms: The rooms were well-appointed, clean, and came with lovely views of the sea or gardens. The bedding was especially comfortable.

reviews.title: Exceptional staff and a beautiful, peaceful beach
reviews.positives:
I had a wonderful stay here in late February/March 2026. Despite the challenging situation in the Middle East at the time, the hotel staff were the absolute highlight. They were incredibly helpful, providing clear information for stranded travelers and managing everyone’s stay with grace and efficiency.

The Highlights:
The Staff: Truly the heart of this hotel. Their support during a difficult time was impressive.
The Beach: Clean, spacious, and blissfully free of seaweed. At times it felt like a private, deserted paradise.
Connectivity: The Wi-Fi coverage is excellent—it even works perfectly on the remote parts of the beach.
Location: Good, walkable distance to a nearby mall with a great selection of boutiques.
reviews.negatives: The rooms are good but could be better equipped. For a hotel of this caliber, I would expect an iron to be standard in the room, as clothes inevitably get wrinkled in a suitcase.

recently stayed at Sofitel Al Hamra Beach Resort and booked one of their villas — and I must say, it was an exceptional experience. The villa was beautifully designed, extremely clean, and offered a peaceful atmosphere.

What truly made the stay outstanding was the level of service. Every staff member was welcoming, professional, and always smiling, which made us feel truly valued. From check-in to check-out, everything was smooth and handled with great care.

At check-out, I was assisted by Mr. Mohsen Izmigna, who was incredibly polite and attentive. He kindly asked if I enjoyed my stay and whether I had any comments or suggestions — a true example of top-level customer service.

This is definitely one of the best hotels I’ve ever visited, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a luxurious and relaxing getaway. Will surely be coming back again!

reviews.title: PERFECT GETAWAY!!!
reviews.positives:
✨ Exceptional Stay at Sofitel Al Hamra ✨

Our recent stay at Sofitel Al Hamra was nothing short of amazing! From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel incredibly welcome — not just us, but our beloved pets too! Their pet-friendly environment truly sets them apart.

The amenities were top-notch, the beach access was fantastic, and the friendly staff went above and beyond to make our anniversary special. We were surprised with a free cake and a warm anniversary greeting, and to top it off, we were given a late checkout, which was a wonderful gesture.

A special shoutout to Thin, Kasun, Mazan, and the amazing reception team who made our stay unforgettable. Your kindness and hospitality were truly heartwarming.

If I could rate this hotel, it would be an 11/10! I highly recommend Sofitel Al Hamra to anyone looking for a luxurious, pet-friendly getaway. Thank you for welcoming us and our pets with so much love and compassion. We’ll definitely be back!

Kudos to the entire team!

reviews.title: Perfect for a staycation I have no words
reviews.positives:
Everything.
The experience here was so positive and we had a best time here.
The front desk staff Mr. Sultan and Saad were really friendly and helpful. Even updated our room to a villa, also learned that it was possible to do late checkout as well, but we didn’t since we weren’t aware of it. But feeling grateful already! The room was spacious and clean, with beautiful interior and products! They used eco design toiletries which was just perfect. 
Also the staff driving the buggy car Mr. Irfan was really helpful and friendly as well. 
The weather was pretty hot, I hope all the staff that need to be exposed under the sun could stay hydrated all the time.
The swimming pool were fabulous, they have four with different depths and shapes. My favorite was the one closer to the beach, it was incredibly beautiful and relaxing since lots of families were playing in the other pool.
They also gave us ice bucket to cool down our water which was really thoughtful.
The beach was beautiful too but since the weather was too hot, the sea was too warm for us to enjoy. But the sea was def friendly for kids and families since it is not deep at all.
Breakfast was well organized with limited variety. 
Gym was small but with great machines to have a workout there.
All in all, it was 99% all positive experiences. I hope they maintain the quality. Will be coming back for sure.
reviews.negatives:
Just a few.
There was a beeping sound from a control panel of the villa outside our room all the time, but the staff sorted it out quickly once we made a call. But it kept happening, hope someone will fix it. (Villa number 21)
During dinner hours, lots of request for the buggy services and they forgot our request so we were waiting for about half an hour, later we successfully made a call again and the buggy arrived quickly afterwards. Hope during the peak hours, they could try to have more buggy cars in service (especially in winter there would be much more people!), or at least remember which room has called before!
